prestazioni: Engine swap to Renault-Nissan **H4M (HR16DE)** 1.6L naturally aspirated inline-4 (114 HP stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 60 trim) running 1.2 bar of boost, paired with a **Toda Racing forged crankshaft (86mm stroke)** and **JE Pistons 8.5:1 compression forged slugs** for 300+ HP on E85. Supporting mods include a **GReddy intercooler (550x225x65mm core)** and a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a **Milltek Sport 76mm rear section** and **Scorpion 4-2-1 headers** (1.75-inch primaries).

Full **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (8-position rebound, 12-click compression)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs** (25% stiffer than OEM) and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms)** to eliminate flex in the **B0 platform** chassis. **Brembo GT 330mm front brake kit (4-piston calipers, 30mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines** for stopping power.

Standalone **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **AEM X-Series wideband (30-0300)** and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158003 1000cc injectors** for precise fueling. **Nismo LSD (C-plate type, 2.5-way)** for the **JR5 5-speed manual transmission** with a **Peloquin differential cover** and **Motul Gear 300 75W-90** fluid. **ACT HDSS clutch (6-pad sprung, 2400lb pressure plate)** to handle the torque.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Logan MCV widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the MCV’s extended wheelbase) with **carbon fiber overfenders (25mm flares front/rear)**, **custom aluminum rear diffuser**, and **Vortex Generator roof spoiler** for aero balance. **OEM+ color-matched **Renault Sport Megane IV RS front bumper** (modified to fit) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (30% weight reduction)** and **Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (7-inch, 100W)** in **custom aluminum buckets**.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +25 front, 17x10 +30 rear)** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear)** for grip. **Custom aluminum rear door skins (replaced with **Alpina-style mesh grilles** for airflow) and **debadged Dacia emblems** (replaced with **3D-printed ‘Logan MCV RS’ badges in gloss black**).

**Full interior cage by **Custom Cages UK** (8-point bolt-in, T45 steel, 2.5mm wall thickness) with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shells, FIA-approved)** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS lap timer** mounted on a **custom aluminum dash panel**. **Sound deadening removed entirely** and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme (1mm aluminum layer)** for weight reduction.
